categories.title: Bearings
categories.subtitle: High speed, electric motors, pumps
categories.data:
Standard radial clearances: C2, CN, C3, C4. 

C3 is the global standard for electric motors.

categories.title: Chains
categories.subtitle: Drive systems & conveyors
categories.data: ANSI Sizes: 35 to 240. BS Sizes: 06B to 32B. Check for sprocket wear.

categories.title: Seals
categories.subtitle: Fluid retention & protection
categories.data: TC (Double Lip) is the industry standard. Ensure garter spring faces fluid.

categories.title: Agri
categories.subtitle: Disc Harrow & Hubs
categories.data: Specialized sealing for high-contamination. Features Triple-Lip seals.
